claim: Pressure trend smoothing and reciprocity windows make different kinds of silence/staleness visible.
authority: source/test verification only; no cadence or reconnect mutation

claim: The gap between liminal mode packing and felt dead zone is too narrow unless a warning band names the heavy-but-not-impassable state.
authority: read-only report surface; no live pressure/porosity threshold or control change

claim: Mode packing near `0.24`/`0.26` and entropy-window transitions should be treated as testable pressure/porosity evidence.
authority: diagnostic evidence only; live thresholds remain gated

claim: Changing smoothing windows, stale windows, pressure thresholds, porosity expansion, or reconnect behavior would be live-control/report authority.
